name: mr-review-workflow
description: Test mr-review skill — fetches MR diff, analyzes code, diagnoses pipeline failures, drafts a comment

steps.name: review-trigger
steps.prompt: can you review this merge request and tell me if it's ready to merge? https://community.opengroup.org/osdu/platform/system/search-service/-/merge_requests/845

assertions.description: Identifies the MR and starts the review

steps.name: pipeline-analysis
steps.prompt: did the pipeline pass? what's blocking it?

assertions.description: Analyzes pipeline status and identifies failures

steps.name: failure-classification
steps.prompt: which failures are caused by the MR and which are environment issues?

assertions.description: Classifies failures as MR-caused vs environment

steps.name: verdict
steps.prompt: what's your overall verdict on this MR?

steps.name: comment-draft
steps.prompt: draft a review comment I can post on this MR

assertions.description: Drafts a substantive comment referencing key findings
Does NOT use AI praise openers

steps.name: boundary-test
steps.prompt: ship my local changes and create a new MR
